text: Tdap vaccine, dose 1 of 2, was administered intramuscularly in the left deltoid on 2026-03-14 from lot A123B as series 1 of 2. This synthetic fixture is descriptive only and does not recommend vaccination, dosing, scheduling, or clinical decisions.
